name: student-presentation-suite
description: Student presentation planning, PPTX generation/improvement, and review suite with shared standards, image strategy, Slide Spec handoff, anti-AI wording checks, and static PPTX review.

interface.shortDescription: 规划、生成和审阅大学生演示，覆盖 Q&A、AI 写作风险和版本对比。
interface.longDescription: Student Presentation Suite provides three Codex skills: one for student-friendly topic narrowing, outline planning, speaker notes, Q&A defense prep, Slide Spec handoff, timing, and group handoffs; one for producing or improving editable PPTX decks with visual style presets, structural shapes, topic-specific output files, meaningful visuals, change summaries, shared image strategy, and classroom-focused QA; and one for reviewing existing student decks for logic, readability, AI-like wording, AI-writing pattern risk, rubric fit, positive feedback, Slide Spec alignment, before/after changes, PPTX XML static risks, speaker notes, and defense readiness. Shared references keep startup constraints, typography, image handling, and anti-AI rules consistent across skills.
capabilities: Existing deck improvement with change summaries
Codex PPTX production uses the default Presentations skill/artifact-tool workflow
Uses document-skills pptx skill for Claude Code PPTX production
interface.defaultPrompt: 帮我规划、生成或审阅一个大学生课堂汇报。
